name: proxmox-mcp
description: MCP server for Proxmox VE homelab management. Exposes node, VM, container, and storage operations via MCP tool calls.
safety: All destructive operations require homelab-safe-ops confirmation.
Credentials must be in env vars, never in prompts or code.
Use read-only token for monitoring tasks; write token only for change tasks.
notes: Replace all placeholder values with actual Proxmox credentials from your secrets manager.
